data.title: Nidec Announces the Receipt of a Request by a Shareholder to File an Action
data.description: In Kyoto, Japan, it was reported that on March 27, 2026, a written request was received from a single shareholder of the company, urging for legal action under Article 847, Paragraph 1 of the Companies Act. The request, known as the "Request for Filing an Action," calls for the company to take measures to pursue liability and other remedies against current actions.
EU ENERGY MINISTERS WILL ON TUESDAY DISCUSS COORDINATION OF THE EU RESPONSE ON ENERGY TO THE MIDDLE EAST SITUATION, EU BRIEFING DOCUMENT FOR THE MEETING SHOWS

data.title: Hikvision introduces LinkVu: An integrated IoT & networking solution for SMB installers
data.description: In Hangzhou, China on March 30, 2026, Hikvision, a prominent AIoT solution provider, introduced LinkVu. This comprehensive visual solution is tailored to enhance the capabilities of IoT and networking project installers in catering to small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). LinkVu presents a wide range of features and tools to support these installers, aimed at maximizing their efficiency and effectiveness in serving SMBs.

data.title: Bavarian Nordic – Transactions in Connection with Share Buy-Back Program
data.description: Danish company Bavarian Nordic A/S (OMX: BAVA) has revealed details of its share buy-back program initiated on March 12, 2026. The company plans to repurchase shares worth up to DKK 200 million between March 12 and May 13, 2026. This initiative complies with Regulation (EU) No. 596/2014 and Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052, known as the Safe Harbour Regulation, relating to market abuse prevention.

data.title: Beijing Review: Prosperity on the Plateau
data.description: On March 28, 1959, the people of Xizang, under the leadership of the Communist Party of China (CPC), initiated their democratic reform, putting an end to centuries of feudal serfdom. This led to the liberation of one million individuals from servitude. The historic event marked a significant turning point in the region's history.

data.title: Solana's price hovers at $84.32, RSI at 44.81. Analysts foresee potential $88 resistance in two weeks amid mixed signals.
data.description: Solana is currently priced at $84.32, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 44.81. According to technical analysis, there is a possibility that SOL may reach a resistance level of $88 in the next two weeks. However, bearish signals from the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator advise caution.

data.title: UPM strengthens presence in India with a new Adhesive Materials terminal near New Delhi
data.description: Helsinki - On March 30, 2026, UPM Adhesive Materials, a leading provider of cutting-edge self-adhesive label materials worldwide, announced plans to increase its presence in India by establishing a new slitting and distribution facility close to New Delhi. This investment aims to boost UPM Adhesive Materials' operations and improve service in the region.

data.title: Cardano nears $0.29 breakout as 365-day MVRV at -43%; could hit $0.26 if bulls break resistance at $0.26.
data.description: The ADA cryptocurrency is displaying signs of a rebound after reaching deeply oversold levels, with its 365-day MVRV standing at -43%. According to technical analysis, there is a chance for a potential upward movement towards the $0.29 resistance level if bullish momentum manages to surpass the $0.26 barrier.

data.title: BNB at $618, neutral RSI at 42.95. Analysts predict $650-680 price range by April 2026. Resistance at $633 key.
data.description: The digital currency BNB is currently trading at $618, with a neutral RSI standing at 42.95 and a bearish MACD momentum. According to technical analysis, there is a predicted upside potential of $650-680 if the $633 resistance level is surpassed, while maintaining the $603 support level is deemed critical.

data.title: ISA Deadline Challenges Highlight How Agentic AI and Omnichannel Engagement Help Attract UK Savers
data.description: A London-based company, Infobip, recently emphasized the benefits of utilizing Agentic AI and omnichannel messaging for UK fintechs during ISA season. By incorporating these technologies, fintech companies can effectively differentiate themselves in a crowded market, tailor their interactions with customers, and enhance the security of deposits. This strategy enables UK fintechs to navigate the competitive ISA season landscape successfully.

data.title: XRP may surpass $1.52 resistance by April 2026, with short-term target at $1.40-$1.45 and medium-term range of $1.30-$1.55. Support at $1.
data.description: Summary of XRP Price Prediction:In the short term, XRP is predicted to reach a target range of $1.40 to $1.45 within one week. Looking ahead to the medium term, the forecast suggests XRP could fluctuate between $1.30 and $1.55 over the course of a month. A bullish breakout level is anticipated at $1.52. Additionally, a critical support level is identified at $1.

data.title: WTW makes EMEA insurance leadership and regional structure changes to accelerate AI strategy
data.description: On March 30, 2026, a major global advisory and broking company, WTW, disclosed significant changes to its Insurance Consulting and Technology operations in the EMEA region. To address technological advancements and client needs, the company has restructured its presence in EMEA. This includes the establishment of distinct EMEA P&C and EMEA Life divisions to enhance specialization and ensure more reliable service delivery. The aim is to foster innovation more effectively and efficiently, creating a robust foundation for long-term expansion. The company's decision reflects a strategic response to the evolving market landscape and signifies a proactive approach to capitalize on growth opportunities. Through these adjustments, WTW aims to reinforce its position as a key player in the global advisory and broking sector.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer powers high‑stakes professional decision‑making by advancing its Expert AI strategy
data.description: Today, Wolters Kluwer showcased the impressive pace of its AI innovation, emphasizing how its Expert AI strategy provides quick and easily understandable solutions.
